title: knautia macedonica var. indivisa
intro: Knautia macedonica var. indivisa, also known as Macedonian scabious, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Dipsacaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Knautia macedonica var. indivisa is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
